info.title: Finance Manager API
info.description: REST API for the Finance Manager personal finance tracker. All endpoints are profile-scoped via the `X-Profile-Id` header.

200.description: Timeline of net worth by date
Array of budgets with category info
Bill marked as paid, transaction created

201.description: Tag created with auto-assigned color if none provided

200.description: Array of loans with prepayment totals
Loan with rate periods and prepayments
Dashboard data with income, expenses, alerts
Nodes and links for Sankey diagram
Holdings with current prices and market values
Monthly payment, total payment, total interest

schema.description: Any key-value pairs. currency must be 3-letter ISO 4217. locale must be BCP 47.
